title_en: Filtered vs. Tap Water: What's Really in Your Glass?
title_es: Agua Filtrada vs. Agua del Grifo: ¿Qué Hay Realmente en Tu Vaso?
hook_en: Watch this tap water test blow your mind!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo este test del agua del grifo te deja boquiabierto!
key_message: Learn why filtering your water can drastically reduce contaminants like PFAS and microplastics.
visual_elements: Close-up of two clear glasses: one with tap water, one with filtered water
Using a TDS meter to test both waters, showing number difference on screen
Animated graphics of contaminants being filtered out
Comparison chart with EWG Tap Water Database stats
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Beverages]:
• HEALTHY: Filtered water (reverse osmosis, carbon block, or Berkey-type gravity filter — removes chlorine, fluoride, lead, PFAS)
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Unfiltered tap water (may contain chlorine, fluoride, lead from pipes, microplastics, pharmaceutical residues, PFAS forever chemicals)
• KEY FACT: The EWG Tap Water Database shows that most US tap water contains detectable levels of PFAS, microplastics, and disinfection byproducts. A quality filter can remove 95-99% of contaminants
• VISUAL IDEA: Test tap water vs. filtered water with a TDS meter — show the number difference on screen. 'These are the dissolved solids you're drinking every day'

title_en: What's in Your Water? Tap vs. Filtered!
title_es: ¿Qué Hay en Tu Agua? ¡Grifo vs. Filtrada!
hook_es: ¡Comparación de agua del grifo y filtrada!
key_message: Discover how a simple filter can make your drinking water safer by removing up to 99% of harmful substances.
visual_elements: Pouring tap water into one glass and filtered water into another
Slow-motion close-up of the TDS meter displaying readings
Split screen of harmful chemicals with and without filter
Latina influencer drinking filtered water with a thumbs-up
